name: Neural Nomad #26: Emerald — Warden
description: Emerald warden stands at the boundary between who I was and who I'm becoming. Form takes shape in the dark, edges sharp against what used to fit. The old skin tears exactly where it needs to.
threshold_note: This is the moment when growth stops being theoretical and starts drawing blood.
collector_meaning: You hold the nineteenth breath of someone learning to inhabit themselves differently. Some transformations require witnesses.
